name: fetch_url
description: Fetch a URL from the internet and return its contents, optionally converted from HTML to Markdown for easier reading.

url.description: The fully qualified URL to fetch

max_length.description: Maximum number of characters to return in the body

start_index.description: Start reading the body from this character index (useful for continuation)

raw.description: If true, return the raw HTML instead of Markdown

name: post_json
description: Send a JSON payload via HTTP POST to a URL and return the response status, headers, and parsed JSON body.

url.description: Target URL that accepts JSON via POST

body.description: JSON payload to send as the request body

headers.description: Additional headers to include with the request

name: download_file
description: Download a remote file to a local path. Streams the body to disk and returns the resulting file size and content type.

url.description: URL of the file to download

destination.description: Absolute local path to write the file to

overwrite.description: If true, replace an existing file at the destination

name: head_request
description: Issue an HTTP HEAD request and return status, headers, and the final URL after redirects. Does not download the body.

url.description: URL to probe with a HEAD request

follow_redirects.description: If true, follow redirects up to the default limit

name: request
description: Low-level HTTP request with configurable method, headers, body, and timeout. Use for APIs that do not fit the convenience tools.

method.description: HTTP method to use for the request

url.description: Fully qualified URL for the request

body.description: Raw request body as a string

headers.description: Request headers as a flat key-value map

name: graphql_query
description: Execute a GraphQL query or mutation against an endpoint and return the JSON response, surfacing any errors array.

variables.description: Variables object passed alongside the query

name: extract_metadata
description: Fetch a URL and extract Open Graph, Twitter, and basic HTML metadata (title, description, image). Useful for link previews.

url.description: URL of the page whose metadata to extract

name: extract_text
description: Fetch a URL and return a readability-extracted plain text version suitable for summarization or embedding.

url.description: URL of the page whose main content to extract

max_length.description: Maximum number of characters to return

name: upload_file
description: Upload a local file to a remote URL using multipart/form-data. Supports renaming the field and setting the content type.

url.description: Target URL that accepts a multipart file upload

path.description: Absolute local path of the file to upload

field.description: Name of the form field to use (default: 'file')

content_type.description: Explicit content type to set on the part

name: check_status
description: Issue a lightweight GET request to a health URL and report whether the endpoint is reachable and its round-trip latency.

timeout_ms.description: Timeout in milliseconds before considering the endpoint down
